---
name: adhering-to-yagni
description: Use when tempted to add functionality for hypothetical future needs - enforces You Aren't Gonna Need It by building only what current requirements demand.
---

# Adhering to YAGNI

Build only what the current, concrete requirement demands. Resist speculative
generality, configuration knobs nobody asked for, and abstraction layers added
"just in case."

See `references/checklist.md` for the review checklist.
